# Agentic Workspace Proof Route Hints

Advisory proof route hints discovered during lifecycle setup/adopt. Hints are not host policy and require live confirmation before command selection.

- Source schema: `src/agentic_workspace/contracts/schemas/proof_route_hints.schema.json`
